_comment: GT7 carCode -> car metadata. carCode is the int32 at packet offset 0x124. Add entries as you encounter new cars; unknown codes are logged on capture so you know what to fill in. Class follows GT7 convention (Gr.1/2/3/4/B/X, N-class etc).
_source: Seeded from memory + captures. The wider community list lives at https://github.com/Nenkai/PDTools (carCode dump) — copy entries as needed.
